code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)

mut line_start = 0
mut has_nonws = false
mut last_start = 0
mut last_stop = 0
mut found = false

mut i = 0
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 10
    if has_nonws
      last_start = line_start
      last_stop = i
      found = true
    end
    line_start = i + 1
    has_nonws = false
  else
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
      has_nonws = has_nonws
    else
      has_nonws = true
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if has_nonws
  last_start = line_start
  last_stop = n
  found = true
end

if found
  println(string.substring(input, last_start, last_stop))
else
  println("(none)")
end
